businessRules.membershipDiscount: 20% off active regional display string; checkout uses 80% of regional usdCents when membership enabled

rules.decision: One global course catalogue; do not create separate regional course copies.
Regional pricing by residence + billing country; checkout processed in USD equivalent.
Exam-focused; direct checkout or light verification depending region.
Mentor-led; consultation required. South Asia scholarship unavailable by default.
If regional pricing unavailable, offer Global price, scholarship review, or waitlist.
Use IP + selected region + billing country + residence; phone number is not enough.

overview.recommendedMessage: Regional pricing is based on current country of residence and billing country, not nationality. South Asia pricing is offered as regional scholarship pricing for learners residing and billing from India or Pakistan. Some mentor-led Mastery tiers may not be available under regional scholarship pricing; learners may request a scholarship review, join the waitlist, or enroll at the Global price.

regions.label: Global / Unknown
regions.mismatchRule: Use Global price unless validated otherwise
regions.websiteMessage: Your price is shown in Global USD.

regions.label: Europe
regions.mismatchRule: Switch to billing-country region or review
regions.websiteMessage: Europe price shown. Taxes/vat may apply depending billing country.

regions.label: UK
regions.mismatchRule: Switch to billing-country region or review
regions.websiteMessage: UK price shown. Taxes may apply depending billing country.

regions.label: GCC
regions.mismatchRule: South Asia selection requires verification; otherwise switch back to GCC
regions.websiteMessage: GCC regional price is based on residence and billing country.

regions.label: India
regions.mismatchRule: If billing country is not India, switch to correct region or review
regions.websiteMessage: India Regional Scholarship Pricing applies only to learners residing and billing from India.

regions.label: Pakistan
regions.mismatchRule: If billing country is not Pakistan, switch to correct region or review
regions.websiteMessage: Pakistan Regional Scholarship Pricing applies only to learners residing and billing from Pakistan.

websiteCopy.pricing_selector: Regional pricing is based on current country of residence and billing country, not nationality.
websiteCopy.south_asia_pricing_note: South Asia pricing is offered as regional scholarship pricing for learners residing and billing from India or Pakistan.
websiteCopy.mastery_unavailable_notice: This mentor-led Mastery tier is not currently available under your regional scholarship pricing. You may request a scholarship review, join the waitlist, or enroll at the Global price.
websiteCopy.checkout_note: Final checkout is processed in USD equivalent. Regional pricing is used to calculate the applicable checkout amount.
websiteCopy.compliance_note: Prices exclude official exam fees, certification-body fees, taxes, vouchers, membership fees, and third-party charges. PM Structure is currently an independent exam-prep and project management learning platform.
